# Needlr

> Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation.

Needlr automates service registration, decorator wiring, hosted service
discovery, keyed services, factories, interceptors, and AI agent integrations
(Semantic Kernel, Microsoft Agent Framework) with compile-time safety.
Author: Nick Cosentino (https://www.devleader.ca).

- [Home](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/) -- Needlr is an opinionated fluent dependency injection library for .NET with source generation -- automate service registration, decorators, interceptors, factories, and AI integrations with compile-time safety.
- [Getting Started](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/getting-started/) -- Learn how to install and set up Needlr for dependency injection in .NET -- step-by-step guide covering NuGet packages, source generation, reflection, and your first console and web application.
- [Core Concepts](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/core-concepts/) -- Understand Needlr's architecture -- the Syringe class, source generation vs reflection discovery strategies, service lifetimes, and automatic registration rules for .NET dependency injection.

## Features

- [Service Registration](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/register-as/) -- Use the RegisterAs attribute to control exactly which interfaces a class is registered as in .NET dependency injection, overriding Needlr's default all-interface registration.
- [Hosted Services](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/hosted-services/) -- Automatically discover and register IHostedService and BackgroundService implementations in .NET using Needlr -- no attributes required for hosted service auto-discovery.
- [Keyed Services](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/keyed-services/) -- Register and resolve multiple implementations of the same interface in .NET 8+ using Needlr's Keyed attribute -- keyed service support with source generation and reflection.
- [Options Binding](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/options/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [HttpClient Options](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/http-clients/) -- Source-generated named HttpClient registration in Needlr via the [HttpClientOptions] attribute. Reuses the [Options] configuration-binding story, uses marker interfaces for capability composition, and is extensible to resilience and handler chains without breaking existing consumers.
- [Factories](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/factories/) -- Generate factory interfaces and delegates for .NET classes that require runtime constructor parameters using Needlr's GenerateFactory attribute -- source generation only.
- [Providers](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/providers/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [Tiered Provider Selector](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/tiered-provider-selector/) -- Configure how TieredProviderSelector reacts to provider exceptions — match exception kinds, skip failing providers for a duration, run a callback on hit. Replaces the hardcoded ProviderUnavailableException catch with declarative, per-instance policies.
- [Interceptors](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/interceptors/) -- Add cross-cutting concerns to .NET services using Needlr interceptors -- intercept method calls with a single implementation that works across any service without modifying business logic.
- [Open Generic Decorators](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/open-generic-decorators/) -- Define a single decorator class that automatically wraps all closed implementations of an open generic interface in .NET using Needlr's open generic decorator support -- source generation only.
- [Compose and Expose Closed Generics](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/composed-closed-generics/) -- Source-generate a registration of an open generic composition type closed over the type argument of every discovered implementation of another open generic interface, exposed as a non-generic facade -- source generation only.
- [Cancellation-Aware Logging](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/cancellation-aware-logging/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [Service Catalog](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/service-catalog/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [Breadcrumbs](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/breadcrumbs/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [.NET MAUI](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/maui/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [AI Integrations](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/ai-integrations/) -- Integrate AI agent frameworks with Needlr in .NET -- automatic function discovery, DI wiring, and lifecycle management for Semantic Kernel and Microsoft Agent Framework.
- [GitHub Copilot](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/copilot/) -- Use GitHub Copilot as an IChatClient provider in Needlr -- zero-cost local AI for agent development with web search tool support.
- [Agent Functions](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/agent-functions/) -- Parameter optionality, default-value resolution, and DTO null-handling semantics for [AgentFunction]-decorated tools in Needlr's source-generated AIFunction wrappers.
- [Iterative Agent Loop](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/iterative-agent-loop/) -- Run multi-step agentic workloads with O(n) token cost using Needlr's iterative agent loop -- workspace-driven prompt construction eliminates conversation history accumulation.
- [Tool Result Middleware](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/tool-result-middleware/) -- How Needlr's ToolResultFunctionMiddleware translates tool exceptions and IToolResult returns into LLM-safe responses, and the trade-offs of enabling it.
- [Progress Reporting](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/progress-reporting/) -- Track agent and workflow execution in real-time with Needlr's progress reporting system -- auto-discovered sinks, per-orchestration isolation, and ambient async context.
- [Stage Termination](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/stage-termination/) -- Typed-case StageTermination hierarchy describes why a pipeline stage stopped — pattern-match in C#, low-cardinality OTel tags via ToTagValue, polymorphic JSON wire format.
- [Pipeline Metrics](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/pipeline-metrics/) -- Pipeline-shape OpenTelemetry metrics and distributed-tracing spans emitted automatically by SequentialPipelineRunner — per-pipeline outcome, per-stage duration / tokens / tool-failures, parent + child activity spans.
- [GenAI Token Metrics](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/gen-ai-token-metrics/) -- Emit cache_read and reasoning measurements on the OpenTelemetry gen_ai.client.token.usage histogram so dashboards can answer "what's my prompt-cache hit ratio?" and "how many tokens went to reasoning vs final completion?" per LLM call.
- [Evaluation](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/evaluation/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [Langfuse](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/langfuse/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [Testing Tool Integrations](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/testing-tools/) -- Paved-path testing for [AgentFunction]-decorated tools. Use ToolInvocationRunner to exercise the source-generated AIFunction wrapper with seeded workspace state, zero hand-rolled DI, and the same code path FunctionInvokingChatClient takes in production.
- [Workspace](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/workspace/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation

## Advanced

- [Advanced Usage](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/advanced-usage/) -- Advanced patterns for Needlr -- custom assembly scanning, conditional registration, multi-project setups, and edge cases for complex .NET dependency injection scenarios.
- [Serilog Bootstrap](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/serilog/) -- Serilog integration for Needlr — zero-ceremony plugin for ILogger<T> wiring, config-driven setup from appsettings.json, override patterns, and bootstrapper lifecycle management.
- [Plugin Development](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/plugin-development/) -- Build modular .NET applications with Needlr plugins -- implement IServiceCollectionPlugin and IWebApplicationPlugin to encapsulate service registration and configuration in reusable units.
- [Solution-Wide Source Generation](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/solution-wide-source-generation/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [Cross-Generator Plugins](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/cross-generator-plugins/) -- Register plugin types emitted by a second source generator with Needlr using RegisterPlugins() and a module initializer, bypassing the Roslyn generator isolation boundary.
- [Releasing Needlr](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/releasing/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [Benchmarks](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/benchmarks/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation

## Architecture Decisions

- [ADR-0001 DAG Workflow Support](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/adr/adr-0001-dag-graph-workflow-support/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [ADR-0002 ScriptedChatClient Build Decision](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/adr/adr-0002-build-scriptedchatclient-locally/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
- [ADR-0003 Provider-neutral Experiment Runner](https://www.devleader.ca/projects/needlr/adr/adr-0003-provider-neutral-experiment-runner/) -- Opinionated fluent dependency injection for .NET with source generation
